column2: Verify CAA Flight-Ops Inspector Can Access and Understand RPAS Contingency Matrix
column3: ['Log in as a CAA flight-ops inspector with valid credentials. ', "Navigate to the RPAS's contingency matrix page. ", "Verify that the RPAS's contingency matrix is displayed on the screen.
